High.behavioural_evidence: Strong engagement and effective learning behaviour, e.g., high quiz rate, adequate time spent on activities, and reflective navigation through backward jumps.
High.purpose: Reinforce positive learning behaviour and motivate the learner to continue.

Medium.behavioural_evidence: Mixed behavioural patterns suggesting partial understanding, e.g., medium quiz rate, irregular time spent on activities, and moderate process complexity.
Medium.purpose: Recommend revisiting selected learning materials before progressing.

Low.behavioural_evidence: Behaviour indicating potential learning difficulties, e.g., low quiz rate, very short time spent on activities, and frequent forward/backward jumps.
Low.purpose: Alert the learner to potential learning difficulties and encourage corrective actions.
